facilities.name: Sunrise at Pinehurst
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 average across 78 family reviews on EveryPlace; 49 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Sunrise at Pinehurst offers assisted living, memory care, and short-term respite stays in southwest Denver near Pinehurst Country Club.

facilities.name: South Valley Post Acute Rehabilitation
facilities.description: South Valley Post Acute Rehabilitation is a 106-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in southeast Denver.

facilities.name: Garden Terrace Alzheimer's Center of Excellence at Aurora
facilities.description: Garden Terrace is a 120-bed skilled nursing facility devoted entirely to the care of people with Alzheimer's disease and other dementias, located across the street from the Medical Center of Aurora.

facilities.name: Cherry Creek Retirement Village
facilities.review_note: 4.2/5 overall across 61 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Established in 1989, Cherry Creek Retirement Village offers 187 independent living and 30 assisted living apartments in one building across from Meadow Hills Golf Course in Aurora.

facilities.name: MorningStar of Arvada
facilities.review_note: 4.4/5 average across 61 family reviews on EveryPlace; 19 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: MorningStar of Arvada offers 71 independent living, 41 assisted living, and 29 memory care suites in west Arvada near the foothills.

facilities.name: Covenant Living of Colorado
facilities.description: Covenant Living of Colorado is a not-for-profit continuing care retirement community in Westminster offering independent living apartments and cottages, licensed assisted living, a secured memory-support neighborhood, and a skilled nursing center.

facilities.name: Holly Creek Retirement Community
facilities.description: Holly Creek is a Life Plan (continuing care) retirement community in Centennial operated by the Denver-based nonprofit Christian Living Communities. The campus offers independent living, assisted living, memory care, and skilled nursing, with resort-style amenities including a pool and three dining venues. Independent living requires a substantial entrance fee.

facilities.name: Frasier Retirement Community
facilities.description: Frasier (Frasier Meadows) has served Boulder seniors since 1960 on a 20-acre campus and is the city's only accredited continuing care retirement community.

facilities.name: AltaVita Memory Care Centre
facilities.review_note: 4.3/5 overall across 12 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: AltaVita Memory Care Centre is a 56-bed licensed assisted living residence in Longmont designed specifically for people with Alzheimer's and other dementias, offering permanent residence, adult day programs, and respite stays. It is part of the locally owned AltaVita campus that also includes assisted living and independent senior residences.

facilities.name: Seven Lakes Memory Care
facilities.review_note: 4.7/5 across 24 reviews on SeniorAdvisor; 4.2/5 across 9 reviews on Caring.com (July 2026)
facilities.description: Seven Lakes Memory Care is a dedicated memory care community on the shore of Horseshoe Lake in north Loveland, serving residents with Alzheimer's disease and other dementias.

facilities.name: Grace Pointe Senior Care Community
facilities.review_note: 4.2/5 overall across 11 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Grace Pointe is a Greeley family-owned continuing care campus offering independent living, assisted living, memory care, skilled nursing, and rehabilitation in one location.

facilities.name: MorningStar at Mountain Shadows
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 across 65 reviews on Birdeye; 31 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: MorningStar at Mountain Shadows offers 45 assisted living suites and a secure 19-suite Reflections memory care neighborhood on the northwest side of Colorado Springs near Garden of the Gods.

facilities.name: Villa Pueblo Senior Living Community
facilities.review_note: 4.2/5 overall across 34 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Villa Pueblo is a complete campus of care in Pueblo offering independent living in its tower, private assisted living rooms in the Terrace and Pavilion, and skilled nursing and rehabilitation.

facilities.name: The Lodge at Grand Junction
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 overall across 21 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: The Lodge at Grand Junction provides assisted living, memory care, and respite care in a newer building on Patterson Road, managed by Integral Senior Living.

facilities.name: Cottonwood Rehabilitation and Healthcare Center
facilities.description: Cottonwood Rehabilitation and Healthcare Center (formerly Cottonwood Inn) is a 40-bed skilled nursing facility in Durango certified for Medicare and Medicaid.

facilities.name: MorningStar of Fort Collins
facilities.review_note: 4.7 rating on U.S. News-aggregated reviews; 29 reviews on AssistedLivingCenter (July 2026)
facilities.description: MorningStar of Fort Collins offers 55 assisted living suites and 24 memory care suites in its Reflections Neighborhood, across from Warren Lake and Collindale Golf Course on the city's southeast side.

organizations.name: MorningStar Senior Living
organizations.description: MorningStar Senior Living is a Denver-based operator founded by Ken Jaeger in 2003. Its portfolio encompasses more than 40 independent living, assisted living, and memory care communities in operation or development across the western United States, representing over 5,000 units.

organizations.name: Sunrise Senior Living
organizations.description: Sunrise Senior Living, headquartered in McLean, Virginia, operates more than 240 independent living, assisted living, and memory care communities across the United States and Canada, making it one of the largest senior living providers in the country.

organizations.name: Life Care Centers of America
organizations.description: Life Care Centers of America, headquartered in Cleveland, Tennessee, is one of the largest privately held skilled nursing and rehabilitation providers in the United States, operating more than 200 centers nationwide, including the specialized Garden Terrace Alzheimer's centers.

organizations.name: Century Park Associates
organizations.description: Century Park Associates, headquartered in Cleveland, Tennessee, manages more than 40 independent living and assisted living communities across 20 states. The company traces its senior-care roots to 1970 and focuses on independent living, assisted living, and personal care services.

organizations.name: Christian Living Communities
organizations.description: Christian Living Communities is a Denver-based nonprofit senior care organization founded in 1972. It owns and operates senior living communities in the Denver metro area, including the Holly Creek Life Plan community in Centennial, offering the full continuum from independent living through skilled nursing.

organizations.name: Covenant Living Communities and Services
organizations.description: Covenant Living Communities and Services, formerly Covenant Retirement Communities, is a faith-based nonprofit headquartered in Skokie, Illinois. It operates roughly 15 to 16 continuing care retirement communities in about ten states, including Covenant Living of Colorado in Westminster.

organizations.name: MBK Senior Living
organizations.description: MBK Senior Living, headquartered in Irvine, California, owns or manages 38 independent living, assisted living, and memory care communities across six western states, including Seven Lakes Memory Care in Loveland, Colorado.

organizations.name: Integral Senior Living
organizations.description: Integral Senior Living (ISL) is a senior living management company headquartered in Carlsbad, California. It manages more than 100 independent living, assisted living, and memory care communities in 25 states, including The Lodge at Grand Junction in Colorado.

organizations.name: AltaVita Living
organizations.description: AltaVita Living is a locally owned Longmont, Colorado senior living operator whose campus includes the AltaVita Memory Care Centre, AltaVita Assisted Living, and AltaVita Senior Residences independent living, serving the Boulder County area.
